patterns.title: 3. Staking Reward Farming via CREATE2 Identity Rotation

patterns.title: Flash Loan Vault Deflation Attack: Draining Accumulated Yield via Share Price Reset
patterns.rootCause:
Most ERC4626 implementations calculate share price using:



$$sharePrice = \frac{totalAssets}{totalShares}$$
